Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 30 9.2.2 Emergency Stop Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set excluding valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor 1 set assembly excluding body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one test valve 1 set servomotor assembly excluding body 9.2.3 HP Control Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set except valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor assembly 1 set except servomotor body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one pilot valve 1 set of each assembly except body) type and size iv) Set of mounting arrangement for position transmitter for one 1 set HP control valve (complete set comprising of bellows, pins, bushes, couplers, lock washers, position detector) 9.2.4 IP Stop Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set excluding valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor 1 set assembly excluding body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one test valve 1 set assembly except valve body 9.2.5 IP Control Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set except valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servo motor assembly
